input: graph-structured data (node features and adjacency matrix)
backbone: any GNN backbone (e.g., GCN, GAT, etc.)
loss: distillation loss (teacher-student framework with label-attentive encoder)
key_idea: use a label-attentive teacher to generate ideal embeddings that guide the student GNN to learn class-friendly node representations
datasets: 10 benchmark datasets (e.g., MUTAG, PROTEINS, IMDB-BINARY, etc.)
